hero.tagline: میری ہر کاوش میرے رب کے نام
hero.subtitle: Serving humanity with compassion, dignity, and faith.

hadith.text: "The believer's shade on the Day of Resurrection will be his charity."

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: KAAVIISSH is dedicated to uplifting underprivileged communities across Pakistan through ration drives, financial assistance, and sustained welfare programs. We bridge the gap between those who can give and those in dire need, ensuring every contribution reaches the right hands.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: A Pakistan where no family goes to bed hungry, where every deserving individual has access to basic necessities, and where charity is a way of life guided by Islamic values of empathy and service.

about.title: About KAAVIISSH
about.text: Founded with a deep commitment to Islamic philanthropy, KAAVIISSH is a non-profit foundation based in Pakistan. We organize ration drives, provide emergency relief, and support families in overcoming poverty with dignity and respect.

drives.title: Drives & Cases
drives.subtitle: Support ongoing missions or contribute to a specific cause.

donate.title: Donate
donate.subtitle: Your generosity can change lives.
donate.thanksMsg: "May your charity bring ease to those in need."
donate.uploadHint: Click to upload or drag and drop

zakat.title: Zakat Calculator
zakat.subtitle: Calculate your Zakat obligation with live gold & silver rates.
zakat.above: ✅ You are above the Nisab threshold. Zakat is obligatory.
zakat.below: You are below the Nisab threshold. Zakat is not obligatory.
zakat.ratesVerified: Rates are verified against market sources and updated daily.

apply.uploadDocs: Upload supporting documents (CNIC, utility bills, etc.)
